title: BullBrief
description: AI-powered public-company digests built from real-time market and financial data.
content: BullBrief generates AI-powered digests of public companies using real-time market and financial data, helping investors understand business models and financial health faster.
features: Optimized data rendering for fast financial insights
lessons: Designing financial interfaces around speed and clarity
Combining live data retrieval with AI-generated summaries
caption: Solo development

title: UniVizr
description: AI-powered academic planning platform for degree progress, semester planning, and career skill mapping.
content: UniVizr visualizes degree progress and maps coursework to career skill pathways through AI-generated semester planning and student progress dashboards.
features: Dashboards for course progress and industry skill mapping
lessons: Coordinating full-stack features in a collaborative build
Structuring academic data for planning and recommendation workflows
caption: Collaborative full-stack development
